nasb.text: So Hezekiah answered, “It is easy for the shadow to decline ten steps; no, but let the shadow turn backward ten steps.”

esv.text: And Hezekiah answered, “It is an easy thing for the shadow to lengthen ten steps. Rather let the shadow go back ten steps.”

cnv.text: 希西家說：“日影延伸十級容易；不，我要日影倒後十級。”

ccb.text: 希西迦说：“日影前进十度容易，让日影后退十度吧。”
